auto_fail_notes: revenue_amount=$300,000 matches Controller invoiced total ✓. RFC present ('TEST-RFC-008') ✓. Filing present ✓. tax_jurisdiction='Mexico — IVA 16%' correct ✓. No auto-fail triggered. CFDI placeholder is expected in test mode.
decision_commentary: Functional tax filing. Revenue matches invoice total exactly. Jurisdiction and period are correct. The CFDI placeholder and deductibles without cross-references reduce the clarity score but are expected limitations of the test environment. Deductible items are well-chosen: engineering subcontractor coordination fees and permit fees are both legitimate deductibles for this project type.
